title: Weekend Plans
content: During lunch on Friday, Hannah and her friends talked about their weekend plans. One friend wanted to visit the beach, while another planned to stay home and read books. Hannah decided she wanted a quiet weekend without too many activities. She planned to sleep late, clean her apartment, and try a new recipe she found online. On Saturday evening, she also wanted to meet her cousin for dinner downtown. Thinking about the weekend made Hannah smile. After a stressful week at work, she was ready to relax and enjoy her free time.
